O

onAddButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewAppointments
opens the add appointment form
onAddButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewCustomers
opens the add customer form
onAppointmentsButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.MainMenuForm
opens the view appointments screen
onBackButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewAppointments
returns to the main menu
onBackButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewCustomers
returns to the main form
onBackButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewReports
returns to the main form
onCancelButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.AddAppointmentForm
closes back out of the form with no changes
onCancelButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.AddCustomerForm
returns the user to the ViewCustomers form
onCustomersButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.MainMenuForm
opens the view customers screen
onDeleteButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewAppointments
Deletes the selected appointment after confirmation and displays a success dialog.
onDeleteButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewCustomers
deletes the selected customer from the database
onLoginButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.LoginForm
performs the login if the user clicks the login button
onLogoutButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.MainMenuForm
logs out the user and returns to the login screen
onPressEnterKeyLogin(KeyEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.LoginForm
performs the login if the user presses enter after typing a username and password in lieu of clicking the login button with the mouse
onReport1GenerateButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewReports
Generates a report based on the selected month and appointment type.
onReport2GenerateButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewReports
Filters and displays appointments for the selected contact in the TableView.
onReport3GenerateButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewReports
Displays a breakdown of the number of customers in each division that has at least one customer displays the results in a list view along with the corresponding country Displays the total number of customers in the system.
onReportsButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.MainMenuForm
opens the reports screen
onSelectShowAll(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewAppointments
sets the table view to show all appointments.
onSelectShowMonthly(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewAppointments
sets the table view to show all appointments for the current CALENDAR month e.g.
onSelectShowNext30Days(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewAppointments
included due to inconsistent understanding of the word "monthly" sets the tableview to show all appointments in the next 30 days
onSelectShowNext7Days(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewAppointments
included due to inconsistent understanding of the word "weekly" sets the tableview to show all appointments in the next 7 days
onSelectShowWeekly(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewAppointments
sets the table view to show all appointments for the current CALENDAR week
onUpdateButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.AddAppointmentForm
Handles the action of clicking the update button, validating the form data, and adding or updating the appointment.
onUpdateButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.AddCustomerForm
adds or updates a customer to the database, depending on if a customer is loaded or not
onUpdateButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewAppointments
Opens the add appointment form, but loads an appointment to update.
onUpdateButtonClick(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewCustomers
opens the add customer form, but loads a customer to update
openConnection() - Static method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Helper.JDBC
opens the database connection using the information stored in the private data members
openForm(String, ResourceBundle, ActionEvent) - Static method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Helper.FormLoader
opens a form and reuses the existing window cleaner and less annoying than orphaning windows
openForm(String, ActionEvent) - Static method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Helper.FormLoader
used to open a form that does not have a resource bundle for extra cheese, we just call the other overload and null out the one argument
